---
id: get-post-filter
title: "Get Post Filter"
description: "This operation is used to fetch the post filter applied to filter tag data in RFID devices. The post filter ensures that only relevant tag data is processed based on specified criteria."
sidebar_label: "Get Post Filter"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/gen-2-x-api-reference
custom_edit_url: null
hide_send_button: true
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get Post Filter"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/get_post_filter"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



This operation is used to fetch the post filter applied to filter tag data in RFID devices. The post filter ensures that only relevant tag data is processed based on specified criteria.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"command":{"type":"string","example":"get_post_filter","description":"Specifies the name of the command executed. In this case, it is get_post_filter to fetch the current post filter information of the device."},"requestId":{"type":"string","example":"abc123","description":"A unique identifier assigned to the request, used to track and correlate responses with their corresponding requests."}}},"examples":{"Get post filter":{"description":"Payload to get post filter configurations","value":{"command":"get_post_filter","requestId":"abc123"}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"default":{"description":"get_post_filter response","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"command":{"type":"string","example":"get_post_filter","description":"The type of command being executed or responded to. For MQTT, this specifies the operation type."},"requestId":{"type":"string","example":"abc123","description":"A unique identifier for the request, used for tracking the request and its corresponding response in the MQTT protocol."},"apiVersion":{"type":"string","enum":["V1.1","V1.0"],"example":"V1.1"},"postFilterPayload":{"title":"postFilterPayload","x-stoplight":{"id":"y5oysu0o0kuvb"},"type":"object","properties":{"postFilter":{"type":"array","description":"A list of post-filter configurations.","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"dataEpType":{"type":"string","description":"The type of data endpoint."},"matchPattern":{"type":"string","description":"The pattern to match during filtering."},"matchPatternMethod":{"type":"string","description":"The method used to apply the match pattern."},"reportOperation":{"type":"string","description":"The operation type for reporting."},"reportDuration":{"type":"integer","description":"The duration (in seconds) for the report operation."},"seenCount":{"type":"integer","description":"The number of times the filter condition has been met."},"rssiThreshold":{"type":"integer","description":"The RSSI (Received Signal Strength Indicator) threshold value."},"tagList":{"type":"object","description":"A list of tags and their associated operations.","properties":{"operation":{"type":"string","description":"The operation to be performed on the tags."},"tagPatterns":{"type":"array","description":"A list of tag patterns to be included or excluded.","items":{"type":"string","description":"A tag pattern string."}}}}}}}}},"response":{"title":"response","x-stoplight":{"id":"1uzw0wye4si2y"},"type":"object","properties":{"code":{"type":"integer","example":0,"description":"Response codes:\n\n| Code | Meaning |\n| --- | --- |\n| 0 | Success |\n| 1 | Command payload is accepted |\n| 2 | Invalid payload |\n| 3 | Not able to retrieve information |\n| 4 | Firmware update in progress |\n| 5 | Can't reboot device, inventory in progress |\n| 6 | Region is not configured |\n| 7 | Interface is not available |\n| 8 | Insufficient flash size |\n| 9 | File not found |\n| 10 | Configuration already exists |\n| 11 | Inventory in progress |\n| 12 | No Radio Operation in Progress |\n| 13 | Firmware update Failed |\n| 14 | Battery is low, Cannot update firmware |\n| 15 | WIFI Error - SSID not found |\n| 16 | WIFI Error - Cannot delete active SSID |\n| 17 | WIFI Error - SSID missed |\n| 18 | WIFI Error - SSID already exist |\n| 19 | WIFI Error - SSID count overflow |\n| 20 | Wifi is not supported |\n| 21 | Certificate not found |\n| 22 | Advanced configuration not set |\n| 23 | Invalid enum value |\n| 24 | Max 32 prefilters limit exceeded |\n| 25 | Max 3 publish topics exceeded |\n| 26 | Max 1 subscribe topic exceeded |\n| 27 | Invalid tenant ID length |\n| 28 | Tag match pattern length exceeded |\n| 29 | Url missing for HTTP source |\n| 30 | Certificate content missing for direct source |","minimum":0,"maximum":30},"description":{"type":"string","description":"response description in detail","example":"Success"}},"required":["code","description"]}}},"examples":{"example1":{"value":{"command":"get_post_filter","requestId":"abc123","apiVersion":"V1.1","postFilterPayload":{"postFilter":[{"dataEpType":"DATA_EP1","matchPattern":"FFFF","matchPatternMethod":"REGEX","reportOperation":"INCLUDE"}]},"response":{"code":0,"description":"Success"}}}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
